latestHandover: Infrastructure Hosting Strategy Audit is 100% complete and verified. Branches renamed to 'audit/260328-infra-hosting' cross-repos. Ready for final PR and merge to main.

sessionHistory.summary: Initial research and strategic pivot toward k3s retirement.
Detailed migration planning for GitHub, Secret Management, and cloud hosting regions. Findings refactored and validated.
Implemented GCP OIDC/WIF for GitHub Actions, modernized CI/CD for planner-frontend and planner-backend, performed global rename to 'planner-backend', and integrated Sentry monitoring.
Verified Cloud Adoption Policy and Supplier Register. Finalized all tasks. Renamed audit branches and prepared for global merge.
